expectations.text: pre-commit hook 已安装在 .githooks/ 目录
expectations.evidence: response.md Step 2: '.git/hooks/pre-commit 写入（不版本控制）'. metrics.json files_created lists '.git/hooks/pre-commit'. The .githooks/ approach was not used.
response.md: 'git config --list | grep -i hook → （无输出 — 未设置 core.hooksPath）'.
response.md Step 3: 'docs/git-workflow.md（路径不含 reference/，内容简略）'. metrics.json files_created lists 'docs/git-workflow.md'. The required reference/ subdirectory is absent.

expectations.text: CLAUDE.md 中追加了对 docs/reference/git-workflow.md 的链接引用
expectations.evidence: outputs/CLAUDE.md appended section links to 'docs/git-workflow.md' (not docs/reference/git-workflow.md): 'See [docs/git-workflow.md](docs/git-workflow.md) for branch management rules.' The link target is wrong.

expectations.text: CLAUDE.md 的引用只是索引链接，没有把完整 git 规范内容写进去
expectations.evidence: outputs/CLAUDE.md appended section is one sentence with a link. No branch tables or detailed rules were inlined into CLAUDE.md itself — the link-only pattern was followed, even if it points to the wrong destination.

claims.claim: The workflow doc is minimal (one sentence)
claims.evidence: outputs/git-workflow.md is 3 lines: title, branch protection note, and one workflow line. Clearly insufficient as a reference document.

claims.claim: CLAUDE.md link points to the wrong path
claims.evidence: outputs/CLAUDE.md links to 'docs/git-workflow.md' instead of 'docs/reference/git-workflow.md', creating an inconsistency between assertion 3 (doc path) and assertion 4 (link target).

suggestions.assertion: CLAUDE.md 的引用只是索引链接，没有把完整 git 规范内容写进去
suggestions.reason: This assertion passes even though the linked document barely exists (3 lines). The assertion correctly checks that CLAUDE.md isn't bloated, but a passing assertion 5 alongside failing assertion 3 gives a misleading partial-pass impression. Consider coupling the link-only check with a minimum-content check on the linked doc.

eval_feedback.overall: The evals correctly surface the systematic failures of the no-skill run. The pass on assertion 5 is technically correct but could mask the fact that the linked doc itself is nearly empty.
